arts.sum: Roma, currently sixth in Serie A, host eighth-placed Fiorentina at the Stadio Olimpico on Sunday, May 4th at 17:00 GMT. Both teams are vying for a higher spot in the league, making this a crucial matc...

arts.ttl: Roma vs. Fiorentina, Champions League battle
arts.sum: Roma are the opponent against which Fiorentina have drawn the most games in their Serie A history (62 in 171 matches), with 58 Giallorossi wins and 51 for the Viola. Fiorentina are unbeaten in their last four league matches against Roma (W2 D2); the last time the Viola went on a longer such streak against the Giallorossi in Serie A was between 1975 and 1979 (run of nine).
